category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Mexico market access, NOM-016-ENER-2016 energy efficiency, electrical safety NOMs, and NYCE/ANCE certification routes.

title.en: China-to-Mexico Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入墨西哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入墨西哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Mexico NOM-016-ENER-2016 energy efficiency, NOM electrical safety, NYCE/ANCE certification, CONUEE oversight, and Spanish labelling expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与墨西哥 NOM-016-ENER-2016 能效、NOM 电气安全、NYCE/ANCE 认证、CONUEE 监管及西班牙语标签要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與墨西哥 NOM-016-ENER-2016 能效、NOM 電氣安全、NYCE/ANCE 認證、CONUEE 監管及西班牙語標籤要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NOM certificate, customs determination, CONUEE ruling, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Mexican NOM-ENER, electrical safety, conformity-assessment, customs, labelling, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NOM 证书、海关裁定、CONUEE 裁定、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行墨西哥 NOM-ENER、电气安全、合格评定、海关、标签及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NOM 證書、海關裁定、CONUEE 裁定、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行墨西哥 NOM-ENER、電氣安全、合格評定、海關、標籤及安裝要求。

answer_first.en: Mexico is not a CCC carry-over market: three-phase induction motors must be screened against NOM-016-ENER-2016 under CONUEE, mapped to applicable electrical safety NOMs such as NOM-001-SEDE and NOM-003-SCFI, and certified through an approved body such as ANCE or NYCE where the NOM scope requires it.
answer_first.zh: 墨西哥不能直接沿用 CCC：三相感应电机须按 CONUEE 体系核查 NOM-016-ENER-2016，映射 NOM-001-SEDE、NOM-003-SCFI 等适用电气安全 NOM，并在 NOM 范围要求时通过 ANCE 或 NYCE 等获准机构认证。
answer_first.zht: 墨西哥不能直接沿用 CCC：三相感應電機須按 CONUEE 體系核查 NOM-016-ENER-2016，映射 NOM-001-SEDE、NOM-003-SCFI 等適用電氣安全 NOM，並在 NOM 範圍要求時通過 ANCE 或 NYCE 等獲准機構認證。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification authority, customs, market-surveillance, electrical-installation authority, CONUEE source, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Which NOM standard governs energy efficiency for industrial motors in Mexico?
q.zh: 哪项NOM标准规范墨西哥工业电机的能效？
q.zht: 哪項NOM標準規範墨西哥工業電機的能效？

a.en: NOM-016-ENER-2016 sets mandatory minimum energy efficiency requirements for three-phase induction motors in Mexico. Certification must be obtained through a CONUEE-approved body such as NYCE or ANCE, and the NOM mark must appear on the product nameplate.
a.zh: NOM-016-ENER-2016规定了墨西哥三相感应电机的强制最低能效要求。须通过CONUEE批准的机构（如NYCE或ANCE）取得认证，产品铭牌须标注NOM标志。
a.zht: NOM-016-ENER-2016規定了墨西哥三相感應電機的強制最低能效要求。須通過CONUEE批准的機構（如NYCE或ANCE）取得認證，產品銘牌須標注NOM標誌。

q.en: Can a Chinese industrial motor's CCC certificate be used for Mexico market access?
q.zh: 中国工业电机的CCC证书是否可用于进入墨西哥市场？
q.zht: 中國工業電機的CCC證書是否可用於進入墨西哥市場？

a.en: No. Mexico's NOM certification is independent and does not recognise Chinese CCC certificates. Compliance with NOM-016-ENER-2016 (efficiency), NOM-001-SEDE (electrical installation safety), and NOM-003-SCFI (product safety) must be demonstrated through a Mexico-accredited certification body.
a.zh: 不可以。墨西哥NOM认证独立运作，不承认中国CCC证书。须通过墨西哥认可的认证机构证明符合NOM-016-ENER-2016（效率）、NOM-001-SEDE（电气安装安全）和NOM-003-SCFI（产品安全）的要求。
a.zht: 不可以。墨西哥NOM認證獨立運作，不承認中國CCC證書。須通過墨西哥認可的認證機構證明符合NOM-016-ENER-2016（效率）、NOM-001-SEDE（電氣安裝安全）和NOM-003-SCFI（產品安全）的要求。
